markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of DataGrid content creation process for programmatic SEO articles](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Process involves generating metadata, creating article structure in Atlas, and using AI-assisted workflows for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [30-minute target for article creation and light editing; focus on template adherence and link checking, not heavy editing](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Articles should have 6-7 internal links and \~1,200 words; manual additions may be needed if automated process falls short](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Usman to create 10 PSEO articles for DataGrid this week, starting tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)

## Topics

### Metadata Generation Process

  - [Use dedicated ChatGPT space (search for "DG" in folders)](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Copy article assignment name, ask AI for meta title, description, URL, and slug](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Provide 10 previous examples from published articles for context](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Fill Airtable with generated metadata (meta title, description, URL including slug)](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### Article Creation in Atlas

  - [Navigate to Blog and Integrations \> Article Generation Workflow](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Fill in fields using data from Airtable (slug, topic, industry, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Industry field determines template to use (e.g., "AI agents for finance")](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Use Claude to create content structure based on template and company context](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

### Content Generation and Editing

  - [Allow AI to generate article draft (typically 1,000-1,500 words)](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Quick review for template adherence and link appropriateness](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [No heavy editing or polishing required](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Check and count internal links (aim for 6-7)](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Select cover image from AI-generated options](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

### Final Steps and Documentation

  - [Create Google Doc in appropriate Drive folder (e.g., "September 1st")](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Copy article content and title into Google Doc](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Add Google Doc link to Airtable in "Full Article Final" field](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Ensure correct CTA link is added (copy from template)](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nika to send detailed process document to Usman within 5 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Usman to start working on first DataGrid article tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Usman to send draft of first article to Nika for review](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Nika available for support during process implementation](https://fathom.video/share/f5NzfhtU9ztBUQgVe6s-tNPbtdQ8yzxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
